description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named test_release that runs on every pull request to the master branch and on workflow dispatch. The workflow performs a check and then runs tests using a reusable workflow test_runner.yml. It also has a commented out section for testing a new release, which involves reading a version from a YAML file, updating the version in pyproject.toml, building and uploading the package to TestPyPI, and testing the new release.
